synopsis: Reversal of Fortune (sometimes also called Evasive Action: Reversal of Fortune) was a series of daily webstrips published on Hyperspace October 2004 through June 2005, written by Paul Ens and illustrated by Thomas Hodges. The story takes place in the last days of the Clone Wars. As of Celebration IV, a print version of Reversal of Fortune was being considered.
title: Reversal of Fortune
